mapper.select:
WITH PaginatedItems AS ( SELECT i.item_id, i.name, i.price::numeric AS price, i.added_at, i.quantity, i.category_id, i.wear_id, i.seller_cip FROM ebock.item i WHERE i.sold = false AND i.archived = false ORDER BY i.item_id LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset} )
SELECT p.*, u.first_name, u.last_name, it.tag_id FROM PaginatedItems p INNER JOIN ebock.user_ u ON p.seller_cip = u.cip LEFT JOIN ebock.tag_item it ON p.item_id = it.item_id ORDER BY p.item_id;

SELECT i.item_id, i.name, i.description, i.price, i.added_at, i.updated_at, i.quantity, i.category_id, i.wear_id, u.first_name, u.last_name, it.tag_id FROM ebock.item i INNER JOIN ebock.user_ u ON i.seller_cip = u.cip LEFT JOIN ebock.tag_item it ON i.item_id = it.item_id WHERE i.seller_cip = #{cip} AND NOT i.archived;

SELECT i.item_id, i.name, i.description, i.price, i.added_at, i.updated_at, i.quantity, c.name as category_name, w.name as wear_name, i.seller_cip, it.tag_id FROM ebock.item i INNER JOIN ebock.category c ON i.category_id = c.category_id INNER JOIN ebock.wear w ON i.wear_id = w.wear_id LEFT JOIN ebock.tag_item it ON i.item_id = it.item_id WHERE i.item_id = #{id} AND NOT i.archived;
